summary: Frontend-only smoke + UI test of the Adhkari Expo web preview. All required testIDs are present, navigation works across all 5 tabs, the welcome → tabs flow works, the session screen (with counter + audio button) renders for category 'morning', and the auto-advance logic visibly advanced dhikr index from 1 to 3 after 3 taps (i.e. counter→target→next dhikr is working). Settings screen exposes every requested switch/testID including theme, sound, vibration, all notification switches, offset chips, city chips and redownload-btn. No red screen, no JS pageerror. Only harmless warnings present (expo-av deprecation, expo-notifications web push token, useNativeDriver web, pointerEvents prop) which were called out by the main agent as expected.

react_native_issues.issue: expo-av is deprecated and will be removed in SDK 54 per warning. Currently functional but should migrate to expo-audio/expo-video before SDK upgrade. NOT a blocker (called out as expected).
useNativeDriver warning on web (Animated falls back to JS). Harmless on web preview, native build will use native driver.
Deprecation warning - one of the screens still uses the prop instead of style.pointerEvents. Cosmetic only.

action_items: Optional: migrate expo-av usages to expo-audio for SDK 54 readiness.
Optional: replace props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents to silence RN web warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Welcome screen (app/index.tsx) correctly persists 'welcome_seen' on both download and skip paths and gates routing - good.
RootLayout forces RTL via I18nManager and configures audio mode on mount - good.

Tabs use Ionicons text labels (Arabic) for tab titles; tab bar items don't have testID, so playwright was forced to click by Arabic text. Consider adding testID to Tabs.Screen via tabBarButton wrapper for more robust testing.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (7/7 flows verified: welcome, skip→tabs, 5 home categories, session screen render, counter auto-advance, adhan testIDs incl. cities+8 muezzins, tasbih button, more tab switches, settings full testID set)

seed_data_creation: None - app is local-only (AsyncStorage). localStorage was cleared once to force welcome screen.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://b7c99580-3e93-4d68-bfa6-dfb2cfefd2b8.preview.emergentagent.com. Expo runs via tunnel under supervisor - if URL returns 502, run `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` and wait ~25-30s for 'Tunnel ready' in /var/log/supervisor/expo.out.log before testing. Use viewport 414x896 for mobile feel. To force welcome screen, call `localStorage.clear()` + reload. Tab bar items have no testID - click by Arabic text labels (الأذان، المسبحة، المزيد، الإعدادات). Counter targets vary per dhikr - first morning dhikr has target=1, so a single tap auto-advances; verified by index moving from 1 to 3 after 3 taps.
rca_of_issue: Initial preview returned 502 because supervisor expo process was still in STARTING state (Expo --tunnel was retrying ngrok). Resolved automatically after ~25-30s once 'Tunnel ready' appeared. No code change required.
